name: TC4 golem ghost-slot/container edge-case parity
implemented: Golem inventory slots now use a SlotGhost-style Forge 1.19.2 adapter instead of real item slots.
Ghost slots copy stacks into golem Inventory NBT and never consume player items.
Liquid core uses SlotGhostFluid semantics with Forge fluid handler item validation.
Fill core keeps the original SlotGhost limit of 256; other golem ghost slots keep limit 1.
Click handling mirrors ContainerGhostSlots: empty-hand count +/-1, shift-left clear, shift-right +16, throw clears, clone copies.
Shift-click from player inventory copies a filter stack into the first compatible visible ghost slot without moving real items.
Color buttons, toggle buttons, scroll buttons and original guigolem.png layout remain intact.
forge_1192_adapters: AbstractContainerMenu.clicked intercepts ghost slots before vanilla 1.19.2 slot mutation.
